The '''''Night Lady''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] belonging to the [[Yaka]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] known as [[Redstar]]. [[35 ABY/Legends|Six years]] after the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Lowbacca]], and [[Tesar Sebatyne]] boarded the ''Night Lady''. After the crew failed in their attempt to turn the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] away, they pulled [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] on the Jedi, and were subdued by their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. The Jedi then brought Redstar to the maximum security [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[MaxSec Eight]] to stand trial in front of a [[Reconstruction Authority]] inquisitor, [[Athadar Gyad]], who asked about what had occurred on the ''Night Lady''.<ref name="DNI: TJK" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Night Lady'' was mentioned in ''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'', the first installment of ''[[Star Wars: The Dark Nest Trilogy]]'', which was written by [[Troy Denning]] and published in [[2005]].<ref name="DNI: TJK" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1stm}}
